ferx 0.1.5
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

    Reference

    Fitting

    Fit NLME models and inspect results.

    ferx_fit()

    Fit a nonlinear mixed effects model

    ferx_fit_async() print(<ferx_job>)

    Fit a model asynchronously

    ferx_collect()

    Retrieve the result of a background fit

    ferx_sir()

    Run SIR against an existing fit

    summary(<ferx_fit>)

    Summarize a ferx fit result

    Simulation & Prediction

    Simulate observations or compute population predictions from a fitted model.

    ferx_simulate()

    Simulate from a NLME model

    ferx_simulate_with_uncertainty()

    Simulate with parameter-uncertainty propagation

    ferx_predict()

    Population predictions from a NLME model

    Model editing

    Create, inspect, and programmatically edit .ferx model files.

    ferx_model()

    Create a ferx_model object

    ferx_model_new()

    Create a new ferx model file from a skeleton template

    ferx_model_edit()

    Open a ferx model file in an editor

    ferx_model_show()

    Display a ferx model file in the console

    ferx_model_inspect()

    Inspect the structure of a ferx model file

    ferx_model_validate()

    Validate a ferx model file for syntax and structural errors

    ferx_model_section()

    Extract a section from a ferx model file

    ferx_get_section()

    Inspect a section of a ferx model (pipe-friendly)

    ferx_set_section()

    Replace a section in a ferx model (pipe-friendly)

    ferx_model_set_section()

    Replace a section in a ferx model file

    Diagnostics & output

    Extract and visualise parameter estimates, ETAs, and optimizer traces.

    ferx_runlog()

    NONMEM-style run log for a ferx fit

    ferx_runlog_iters()

    Print the full optimizer iteration history for a ferx fit

    ferx_estimates()

    Tidy parameter estimates table

    ferx_warnings()

    Structured warnings from a ferx fit

    ferx_eta_cov()

    ETA-covariate correlation table

    ferx_cov_screen()

    Quick covariate screen against individual parameters and ETAs

    ferx_cor_matrix()

    Correlation matrix of estimated parameters

    ferx_plot_trace()

    Plot optimizer trace from a ferx fit

    ferx_trace()

    Read the optimizer trace from a ferx fit

    check_diagnostics()

    Structured diagnostic flags from a fit result

    Data filtering

    Preview and apply record-level data-selection filters before fitting.

    ferx_selection()

    Preview data-selection filtering

    ferx_selection_excluded()

    Retrieve excluded records from a ferx_data or ferx_fit object

    print(<ferx_data>)

    Print a ferx_data object

    Utilities

    Helper functions for exploring bundled examples and checking model initialisation.

    ferx_example()

    Get paths to example model and data files

    ferx_columns()

    Inspect column headers of a NONMEM data file

    ferx_check_init()

    Quick convergence check with an optimizer trace

    ferx_inits_from_nca() print(<ferx_inits>)

    Derive NCA-based starting values without fitting

    ferx_save_fit()

    Save a ferx fit to a portable .fitrx bundle

    ferx_load_fit()

    Load a fit from a .fitrx bundle

    Contents

    Developed by Ron Keizer, Teun Post.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
